name: Inovalon Healthcare Data Cloud API
what_it_does: Inovalon Healthcare Data Cloud REST API for health plans, pharma/life sciences, and providers to access real-world health data, analytics, and connectivity tools spanning 330M+ patient lives and 70B+ medical events. Enables AI agents to manage real-world evidence dataset assembly for pharmaceutical outcomes research automation, handle risk adjustment HCC gap identification and closure workflow for health plan revenue integrity automation, access HEDIS quality measure performance analytics for health plan star rating improvement automation, retrieve clinical data normalization and enrichment for multi-source healthcare analytics automation, manage pharmacy adherence analytics for medication management program automation, handle care gap identification and outreach for population health management automation, access physician performance and benchmarking analytics for provider network management automation, retrieve clinical trials feasibility and site selection analytics for life sciences automation, manage social determinants of health data integration for health equity analytics automation, and integrate Inovalon ONE Platform with health plan core systems, EHR data lakes, and pharma analytics platforms for end-to-end healthcare data intelligence.
use_cases: Assembling real-world evidence from pharma outcomes research agents
Closing HCC gaps from Medicare Advantage risk adjustment agents
Improving star ratings from quality measure analytics agents
Identifying care gaps from population health management agents
not_for: Point-of-care clinical decision support (use CDS hooks or EHR vendor tools)
Individual patient portal or engagement applications
best_when: A health plan, pharmaceutical company, or large provider organization wanting AI agents to automate real-world evidence generation, HCC risk adjustment gap closure, quality measure analytics, and population health cohort management using Inovalon's multi-petabyte healthcare data cloud.
avoid_when: REAL-WORLD EVIDENCE FDA REGULATORY USE LIMITATIONS: Automated real-world evidence generation via Inovalon for FDA regulatory submissions must comply with FDA RWE framework and pre-specified analysis plan; automated post-hoc RWE analysis without pre-specified hypothesis creates FDA submission credibility risk; engage regulatory affairs counsel before automated RWE analytics for label expansion or drug approval submissions. HIPAA DATA USE AGREEMENT SCOPE FOR INOVALON DATA: Inovalon maintains complex data licensing agreements with contributing health plans and payers; automated analytics using Inovalon dataset must operate within DUA scope limitations on data use and disclosure; automated analytics output commercialization or re-identification attempts creates DUA violation and HIPAA exposure. CMS ANTI-GAMING FOR RISK ADJUSTMENT: Automated HCC gap closure programs using Inovalon must demonstrate genuine clinical value beyond risk score improvement; CMS audits Medicare Advantage organizations for risk score manipulation; automated retrospective chart review programs designed primarily to increase risk scores without clinical care improvement creates CMS audit and False Claims Act exposure.

auth.notes: Inovalon uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes for ONE Platform API access. REST API with JSON. Bowie, Maryland HQ. Founded 1998 by Keith Dunleavy. Taken private by Nordic Capital in 2022 (formerly NASDAQ: INVA). ONE Platform integrates datasets across 330M+ patient lives, 70B+ medical events, 52K+ providers. Real-world evidence, analytics-as-a-service, connectivity, and care enablement products. HITRUST, SOC2, HIPAA. Competes with Optum Analytics, Cotiviti, Health Catalyst, and Truven Health Analytics (IBM Watson Health) for healthcare data and analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise subscription based on platform access, data volumes, and analytics modules; real-world evidence dataset assembly custom pricing; ONE Platform API access as enterprise add-on
pricing.notes: Bowie MD. Nordic Capital private equity. Enterprise subscription. RWE and analytics modules. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; large dataset queries throttled; batch analytics jobs with async result retrieval; webhooks for job completion events

known_agent_gotchas: ASYNC ANALYTICS JOB PATTERN FOR LARGE DATASETS: Inovalon analytics queries over large patient populations are processed as asynchronous jobs; automated analytics agents must implement job submission → polling → result retrieval pattern; synchronous API call pattern that awaits immediate results will timeout on population-scale analytics queries; design automated analytics workflows with job status polling and result expiration management

DATA VINTAGE AND CLAIMS RUN-OUT FOR POPULATION ANALYTICS: Inovalon dataset has claims data run-out lag; population analytics over recent periods (last 60-90 days) will undercount utilization due to claims adjudication lag; automated population health analytics must specify data vintage filter and acknowledge incomplete run-out period in automated reporting output

DATASET LICENSING SCOPE VARIATION BY ANALYTICS USE CASE: Inovalon ONE Platform has separate data licensing for health plan analytics vs pharma RWE vs provider analytics; automated analytics workflows must operate within licensed data scope; data from health plan analytics license cannot automatically be repurposed for pharma RWE submissions without separate licensing agreement and DUA

NORDIC CAPITAL PRIVATIZATION AND PRODUCT ROADMAP: Inovalon was taken private by Nordic Capital in 2022; post-privatization product investment focus and API development priorities may differ from public company roadmap; evaluate platform investment trajectory and API stability before building complex enterprise integrations dependent on long-term Inovalon API compatibility

COHORT DEFINITION REPRODUCIBILITY FOR REGULATORY SUBMISSIONS: Automated real-world evidence cohort assembly via Inovalon for regulatory submissions requires precise cohort definition documentation; automated cohort queries without version-controlled inclusion/exclusion criteria specification creates non-reproducible study design; implement cohort definition versioning and documentation before automated RWE analytics for regulatory use
agent_readiness.security_notes: Healthcare data cloud. HIPAA, SOC2, HITRUST. OAuth2. US. Real-world health data, claims, risk adjustment, and clinical analytics at scale.

security_score_components.security_notes: Healthcare data cloud. HIPAA, SOC2, HITRUST. OAuth2. US. Real-world health data and population-scale analytics.
